title: dianthus superbus subsp. stenocalyx
intro: Dianthus superbus subsp. stenocalyx, a lesser-known subspecies of the greater pink or Dianthus superbus plant, is a type of flowering plant in the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as an expectorant, helping to relieve congestion and coughs. The health benefits of Dianthus superbus subsp. stenocalyx include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support respiratory health. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion, and it is also sometimes used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and salves.
